content.full_text:
California 
Fair Political 
Practices Commission 
Robert K. Stiens 
Clinton Reilly Campaign 
704 Sansome 
San Francisco, CA 
94111 
Dear Mr. Stiens: 
August 28, 1989 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. A-89-436 
We are in receipt of your letter of July 20, 1989 (copy 
enclosed) seeking written confirmation of the advice I provided to 
you in our recent telephone conversation. 
You have advised me 
that you are a volunteer with the Orange County Democratic Central 
Committee and have been authorized to seek this advice on behalf 
of the committee. 
This is to confirm that your letter accurately reflects the 
advice I provided to you. 
If you have any further questions 
regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5901. 
KED:BMB:plh 
Enclosure 
Sincerely, 
Kathryn E. Donovan 
General Counsel 
~l.~~~ 
By: 
Blanca M. Breeze 
Counsel, Legal Division 
428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804,0807 • (916)322,5660 


'99 


California 
Fair Political 
Practices Commission 
Robert K. stiens 
225 S. Newhope #323 
Santa Ana, CA 
92704 
Dear Mr. stiens: 
July 25, 1989 
Re: 
Letter No. 89-436 
We received your letter requesting confirmation of advice 
under the Political Reform Act on July 24, 1989. 
Your letter has 
been assigned to Blanca Breeze for response. 
If you have any 
questions, you may contact her directly at (916) 322-5901. 
If the letter is appropriate for confirmation without further 
analysis, we will attempt to expedite our response. 
A confirming 
response will be released after it has gone through our approval 
process. 
If the letter is not appropriate for this treatment, the 
staff person assigned to prepare the response will contact you 
shortly to advise you. 
In such cases, the normal analysis, review 
and approval process will be followed. 
You should be aware that your letter and our response are 
public records which may be disclosed to any interested person 
upon receipt of a proper request for disclosure. 
KED:plh:confadv1 
Sincerely, 
I ;-t 1/ l t ,)- ''f. 
" 
Kathryn E. Donovan 
General Counsel 
428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804~0807 • (916) 322~5660
